titleStmt.title: SII 16.253: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 253. (A.R. No. 414 of 1926.) MIḌUTŪRU, NANDIKOTKURU TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the front wall of the prākāra of the Chennakēśva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1483, Durmati, Jyēshṭha ba 10, corresponding to 1561 A.D., June 7 (Saturday).

It registers a grant of land in the village Mirutūru in Kaṁnāḍu-sīma to Chenna Mallikārjuna of Śrīgiri for the maintenance of a feeding house for pilgirms during Śivarātri, by Daḷuvāyi Bhadri-nāyaka, son of Chiṭṭela Bommi-nāyaka on the occasion of Uthānadvādaśi for the merit of his father.
It is stated that the gift land formed part of a bigger portion which the donor had received as sarvamānya from Anantarāju Narasarāju. (Compare No. 252 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1483 Agunēṭi dhurmati saṁvatsara jyēṣṭa ba 10 lu śrīmadrājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajra siṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhivi sāmrājyaṁ
cēyucunuṁḍagānu . pṛthiviki mūlastānaṁ śrīgiri caṁnamallikhārjunadēvara divyaśrī pādapadmaṁbulaku . ciṭṭela boṁ
mmināyani komāruṁḍu daḷavāyi bhadrināyanigāru Anaṁttamulaina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁcci vēyiṁccina bhūdā
na dharmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu māku Anaṁttarāju narusarājugāru kaṁnāṭisīmalō mirutūri grāmānanu sarvamānyaṁgānu yiccina pola
ṁ grāmānaku paḍumara yaraboṁmmu yelreḍḍi yīḍuva polaṁ staḷālu 2 lōpalānu grāmānaku vāyuvyāna mūla rēgaḍustaḷaṁ cē
nu kolapāṭi kha 0ø4 Akṣarālā paṁddomaṁddu cēni polamunnu śivarātri paruṣasatrānaku dhāravōśi yistimi tama taṁḍri boṁmmināyanigā
riki puṇyaṁgānu vutthānadvādaśipuṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōśi yistimi Aṁdula kānike kaṭnālu paṁgarokhaṁ saḥgānu trivācakaṁgānu trikara
ṇaśudhigānu dhāravōśi yistimi yī dharmānaku yavvaru tappi naḍacinānu vāraṇāśilō gōvu brāṁhmanni vadhiṁccina papāna bōvuvāru . svadattāṁvā parada
ttāṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭhirvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁjāyatē klimi . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
